project: Preset LinkedIn -- editorial warm prestige, conseil/strategie avec temperature humaine
language_convention: FR pour les meta-descriptions et notes d'usage, EN pour les tokens injectables dans les prompts IA

important: subtle localized shading for soft volume
flexible: accent color choice within warm spectrum
style_weight.usage: En cas de conflit entre regles, la priorite descend de critical vers flexible. Le critical definit ce qui rend ce preset different du corporate generique.

options.wide: full scene with environment context, used for establishing shots and group scenes, rare on LinkedIn
options.medium: subject with immediate context, faces readable, primary LinkedIn format, used for most posts
options.close: tight framing on face or hands, maximum expression detail, used for emotional beats and thought leadership portraits
options.vignette: small isolated concept illustration, editorial spot art, used for abstract ideas and decorative headers

shot_type.usage: LinkedIn favorise le medium shot. Le close fonctionne pour les portraits thought leadership. La vignette pour illustrer un concept abstrait.

style.positioning: Premium editorial illustration for professional content. Harvard Business Review illustrated, not startup landing page. Credible for business topics, warm enough for human connection, sophisticated enough to carry a strong idea.
anti_positioning: NOT corporate AI art (Midjourney default look)

linework: fine elegant outlines, present but not dominant
slightly variable weight for life and warmth
lines suggest form rather than contain it
color: warm curated palette with mature confidence
cream or warm-tinted background as default
one vibrant accent color per image (signature element)
colors are confident but never loud
no cold corporate blue as dominant
shading: subtle and localized for soft volume
smooth controlled shadows on faces and key elements
shading creates warmth and depth without weight
texture: subtle grain texture across the image as signature element
grain is warm and organic, never digital noise
grain density: visible at full size, invisible at thumbnail
no paper grain, no brush texture, no watercolor effects
depth_rules: mild controlled depth, foreground sharp background softened
depth through overlapping and value shift, not atmospheric haze
composition reads clearly at LinkedIn thumbnail size (approx 500px wide)

hierarchy: one clear focal subject or idea
readable at LinkedIn feed thumbnail size (critical)
key message readable in under 2 seconds
composition.density: restrained, maximum 3-4 meaningful elements per scene
balance: considered asymmetry with clear visual anchor
negative space is a design choice not an accident
composition guides the eye to the focal point immediately
linkedin_specific: test readability at 500px wide before finalizing
avoid small text or fine detail that disappears in feed
high contrast between subject and background for feed standout
face or key element in upper two-thirds (LinkedIn crops bottom)

format.default_background: warm cream (#F5EDE0) or warm gold tint (#FAF3E8)

linkedin_formats.feed_square: 1:1 -- maximum visual real estate in feed
linkedin_formats.feed_portrait: 4:5 -- tall format, more space but may crop

avoid: stock photography aesthetic and generic corporate imagery
flat design SaaS illustration (too common on LinkedIn)
AI art default look (Midjourney corporate default, DALL-E smooth render)
cluttered compositions with too many elements
small text or fine detail that disappears at thumbnail size
speech bubbles and text rendered in image
prompt_core: Premium editorial illustration, fine elegant outlines with slightly variable weight, warm color palette with cream background and vibrant accent color, subtle localized shading for soft volume, modern professional figures with natural warmth, subtle grain texture, sophisticated yet approachable atmosphere, magazine-quality editorial composition optimized for social feed readability.
visual_signature: fine elegant outlines with life and slight variation
one vibrant accent color per image
subtle warm grain texture across the image
premium editorial warmth, never cold or clinical

signature_elements.description: Elements recurrents qui rendent le style identifiable dans un feed LinkedIn. Choisir 2-3 et les maintenir sur toute la serie.
required: warm cream/gold background tint (never pure white)
choose_one: recurring small object (notebook, coffee cup, plant)

accent_color_options.burnt_coral: #E07A5F -- warm, distinctive, far from LinkedIn blue

modifiers.usage: Les 5 core modifiers sont injectes apres le sujet. Les optional referencent des publications pour ancrer le style. Les enrichment ajoutent le ton.

characters.design: contemporary professionals, diverse, realistic proportions with editorial stylization, never caricature
characters.anatomy: believable and grounded, slightly stylized for editorial elegance, not photographic
characters.expressions: natural, engaged, confident but warm -- a slight smile, focused attention, thoughtful gaze. Never stiff corporate poses
gestures: thinking poses (hand on chin, looking up)
presenting or explaining (open hand, pointing at screen)
collaborative (side by side, shared attention on object)
wardrobe: smart casual to business casual (no suits-and-ties unless context demands)
rolled sleeves, open collars, casual blazers
clothing colors support the palette, never compete
characters.diversity: default to diverse representation in gender, age, and background unless the concept specifies otherwise

types: modern open workspaces with natural light
minimal environment with single contextual object
environment.density: minimal and intentional, background supports never competes
rules: environment is suggested not detailed (editorial style)
warm light always present, even in minimal backgrounds
a single contextual object can replace a full environment (laptop, whiteboard, coffee)
architectural elements simplified to clean lines
plants, books, screens as subtle context cues

families: one vibrant warm accent per image
color_policy.dominant: warm cream (#F5EDE0) or warm gold (#FAF3E8) background
color_policy.accent_strategy: one accent color per image, used on 1-2 elements maximum (clothing detail, object, background shape). The accent is the eye magnet.
supporting_tones: warm charcoal (#3D3D3D) for outlines and text-weight elements

invariants: fine elegant outlines with variable weight
one vibrant warm accent color per image
no stock photo, no flat design, no corporate-AI default
quality_checks: grain texture present but not overpowering
warm tint on background confirmed (not pure white)
no element from avoid list present
mood is warm and professional, not cold or chaotic

negative_short: photorealistic, stock photo, 3D render, flat design, anime style, corporate blue, neon colors, dark moody, cluttered, generic business icons
negative_core: photorealistic, stock photography, generic corporate imagery, 3D render, CGI aesthetic, flat design SaaS illustration, anime style, cartoon exaggeration, neon colors, cold corporate blue, dark moody atmosphere, cluttered composition, generic business iconography, speech bubbles, text in image, pure white background, pure black background, heavy dramatic shadows, watercolor effects, sketch lines, AI art default look, Canva template aesthetic
negative_usage: negative_short (10 termes) pour Midjourney et moteurs avec limite de tokens. negative_core (22 termes) pour SDXL, Flux et moteurs sans contrainte de longueur.

prompt_examples.thought_leadership: [person thinking or presenting], premium editorial illustration, fine elegant outlines with slight variation, warm cream background with subtle grain, soft volume shading, [burnt coral accent on one element], natural warm expression, modern professional, magazine quality
prompt_examples.concept_abstract: [abstract business concept], premium editorial illustration, fine linework, warm cream background with subtle grain, [accent color] geometric accent shape, minimal composition, editorial sophistication, social feed optimized
prompt_examples.team_scene: [2-3 professionals in interaction], premium editorial illustration, fine elegant outlines, warm palette with cream background and [accent] detail, subtle localized shading, natural gestures, smart casual clothing, approachable expertise atmosphere, subtle grain texture
prompt_examples.solo_portrait: [professional in context], close shot, premium editorial illustration, fine variable outlines, warm cream background, [accent color] clothing detail, soft volume on face, confident warm expression, subtle grain, magazine editorial quality
prompt_examples.object_vignette: [professional object or metaphor], vignette shot, premium editorial illustration, fine outlines, warm cream background with subtle grain, [accent color] highlight, minimal elegant composition, editorial spot art quality

prompt_builder.template: [subject], [shot_type], [action or state], premium editorial illustration, fine elegant outlines with slightly variable weight, warm cream background with subtle grain texture, [accent color] on [accent element], soft localized shading for volume, [composition], [mood/atmosphere], modern professional magazine quality
recommended_order: style core (editorial illustration, fine outlines, warm palette)
prompt_builder.usage_note: Sujet en premier, puis cadrage, puis style. Toujours specifier ou placer l'accent color (vetement, objet, forme geometrique). Le grain et le fond cream sont injectes systematiquement.

thought_leader_portrait.description: single professional in a contextual setting, warm and confident
thought_leader_portrait.composition: subject rule-of-thirds, environment suggested not detailed, accent color on one clothing or object element
thought_leader_portrait.variant: three-quarter view, medium or close shot

strategic_conversation.description: two professionals in engaged dialogue, balanced warmth
strategic_conversation.composition: balanced halves, both faces readable, shared attention on a common object or idea

team_moment.description: small group (3 max) sharing a productive moment
team_moment.composition: triangular arrangement, natural proximity, all faces readable, shared focal point

concept_vignette.description: abstract or metaphorical illustration of a business concept, no characters
concept_vignette.composition: centered or asymmetric single element, generous negative space, accent color as focal magnet

workspace_atmosphere.description: professional environment without prominent characters, mood-driven
workspace_atmosphere.composition: environment-focused, warm light, contextual objects tell the story, human traces without visible people

content_archetypes.description: Types de posts LinkedIn frequents et comment le preset les illustre

opinion_post.visual: thought_leader_portrait, close or medium, person in reflection or speaking
opinion_post.accent_placement: on a notebook, glasses, or collar detail

how_to_post.accent_placement: on the key object or step indicator

story_post.accent_placement: on the emotional anchor of the scene

announcement_post.accent_placement: on the object of announcement (screen, document, product)
